Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &PesRefSts.Clear() retornaAutorizacao.Call('WPREFERENCIASCOMERCIAIS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AutNiv) retornaAutorizacao.Call('AVALIACAOREFERENCIA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &PontuarAutNiv) &PesRefSts.AddItem('A', 'AVALIACAO')
do 'LoadReferencias' if &PontuarAutNiv < 1 tbResumoReferencia.Visible = 0 Endif
Do Case Case &AutNiv < 1 return Case &AutNiv = 1 &PesRefDta.Enabled = 0 &PesRefDtaCli.Enabled = 0 &PesRefLim.Enabled = 0 &PesRefMaiorAtrz.Enabled = 0 &PesRefMaiorCmp.Enabled = 0 &PesRefMaiorDta.Enabled = 0 &PesRefMedCmp.Enabled = 0 &PesRefVlrUltCmp.Enabled = 0 &PesRefVlrUltDta.Enabled = 0 &PesRefFreCmp.Enabled = 0 &PesRefTipPgto.Enabled = 0 &PesRefPrz.Enabled = 0 &PesRefClaTip.Enabled = 0 &ObtEml.Enabled = 0 &ObtFon1.Enabled = 0 &ObtFon2.Enabled = 0 &ObtFon3.Enabled = 0 &PesRefObs.Enabled = 0 &PesMedAtz.Enabled = 0
EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &PesCod.Visible = False &PesRefCod.Visible = False &PesRefEmpCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoBASERFB'
ConsultaRFB.call(&EmpCod, &PesRefEmpCnpj,&AuxPesRaz,&AuxPesFan,&AuxPesCep,&AuxPesLog,&AuxPesNro,&AuxPesBai,&AuxPesCidUfeCod,&AuxPesCidCod,&AuxPesEml, &AuxPesFonNum,&HttpClient) if not &AuxPesRaz.IsEmpty() &PesRefEmpRaz = &AuxPesRaz EndiF // if not &AuxPesFan.IsEmpty() // &PesFan = &AuxPesFan // EndiF if not &AuxPesCidUfeCod.IsEmpty() &PesRefUfCod = &AuxPesCidUfeCod EndiF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &PesRefUfCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','UF'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefUfCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &PesRefEmpRaz.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Razão Social'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefEmpRaz.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &PesRefEmpFan.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Fantasia'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefEmpFan.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &PesRefFon.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Fone_1'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefFon.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&AutNiv > 1) AND &PesRefDta.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data Contato'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefDta.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &PesRefClaTip.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Classificado Como'), DVMessageType.error, &PesRefClaTip.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
do 'ValidaCNPJ_CPF'
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &AutNiv > 1 PesRefDta_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 RequiredDataContentCell DscTop' Else PesRefDta_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &PesRefEmpCnpj.IsValid
do 'ValidaCNPJ_CPF'
EndEvent
Event &PesRefFon.IsValid
FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon, &PesRefFon)
EndEvent
Event &PesRefFon2.IsValid
FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon2, &PesRefFon2)
EndEvent
Event &PesRefFon3.IsValid
FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon3, &PesRefFon3)
EndEvent
Event &PesRefPrz.IsValid
FormataParcela.Call(&PesRefPrz, &PesRefPrz)
EndEvent
Event Enter
&sdtObtidaInf.Clear()
&sdtObtidaInfitem = new() &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtEml' &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor = &ObtEml &sdtObtidaInf.Add(&sdtObtidaInfitem)
&sdtObtidaInfitem = new() &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon1' &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor = &ObtFon1 &sdtObtidaInf.Add(&sdtObtidaInfitem)
&sdtObtidaInfitem = new() &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon2' &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor = &ObtFon2 &sdtObtidaInf.Add(&sdtObtidaInfitem)
&sdtObtidaInfitem = new() &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon3' &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor = &ObtFon3 &sdtObtidaInf.Add(&sdtObtidaInfitem)
FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon, &PesRefFon) FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon2, &PesRefFon2) FormataFONE.Call(&PesRefFon3, &PesRefFon3)
FormataParcela.Call(&PesRefPrz, &PesRefPrz)
do 'CheckRequiredFields'
if &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = true //sem erro &PesRefObt = &sdtObtidaInf.ToJson() GravaReferenciaComercial.Call(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &PesRefCod, &PesRefObs, &PesMedAtz, &PesRefClaTip, &PesRefPrz, &PesRefTipPgto, &PesRefMaiorCmp, &PesRefVlrUltDta, &PesRefMaiorDta, &PesRefVlrUltCmp, &PesRefDta, &PesRefDtaCli, &PesRefFon, &PesRefCon, &PesRefEml, &PesRefEmpCod, &PesRefEmpRaz, &PesRefEmpFan,&PesRefEmpCnpj,&PesRefFon2,&PesRefFon3,&PesRefSit, &PesRefUfCod, &PesRefLim, &PesRefFreCmp, &PesRefMaiorAtrz, &PesRefMedCmp, &PesRefObs2, &PesRefObt, &PesRefSts, &Context.UserName) Return EndIF
EndEvent
Sub 'ValidaCNPJ_CPF'
ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&PesRefEmpCnpj, &Errado, 'N') if &Errado > 0 Msg('CPF/CNPJ Inválido.') &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIF
EndSub
Sub 'LoadReferencias'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesRefCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod Where PesRefCod = &PesRefCod &PesCodRaz = PesCodRaz if PesTip = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA &CnpjCidadeEstado = 'CNPJ: ' + trim(PesCnpj) Else &CnpjCidadeEstado = 'CPF: ' + trim(PesCpf) Endif &CnpjCidadeEstado += ' ' + PesCidUfeCod.Trim() + ' - ' + PesCidNom.Trim() &PesRefObs = PesRefObs &PesMedAtz = PesMedAtz &PesRefClaTip = PesRefClaTip &PesRefPrz = PesRefPrz &PesRefTipPgto = PesRefTipPgto &PesRefMaiorCmp = PesRefMaiorCmp &PesRefMaiorDta = PesRefMaiorDta &PesRefVlrUltCmp = PesRefVlrUltCmp &PesRefDta = PesRefDta &PesRefDtaCli = PesRefDtaCli &PesRefFon = PesRefFon &PesRefCon = PesRefCon &PesRefEml = PesRefEml &PesRefEmpCod = PesRefEmpCod &PesRefEmpRaz = PesRefEmpRaz &PesRefVlrUltDta = PesRefVlrUltDta
&PesRefEmpFan = PesRefEmpFan &PesRefEmpCnpj = PesRefEmpCnpj &PesRefFon2 = PesRefFon2 &PesRefFon3 = PesRefFon3 &PesRefSit = PesRefSit &PesRefUfCod = PesRefUfCod
&PesRefLim = PesRefLim &PesRefFreCmp = PesRefFreCmp &PesRefMaiorAtrz = PesRefMaiorAtrz &PesRefMedCmp = PesRefMedCmp &PesRefObs2 = PesRefObs2
&sdtObtidaInf.FromJson(PesRefObt)
&PesRefSts = PesRefSts if PesRefSts = 'P' and &PontuarAutNiv <= 0 //AVALIACAO PONTUADA &AutNiv = 1 Endif
if PesRefSts <> 'P' and &PontuarAutNiv > 0 &PesRefSts.AddItem('P', 'PONTUAR') &PesRefSts = 'P' Else &PesRefSts.AddItem('P', 'PONTUADA') &PesRefSts = PesRefSts txtAviso.Caption = '' Endif
Exit When none &PesRefSts = 'A' //EM AVALIACAO tbResumoReferencia.Visible = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod &PesCodRaz = PesCodRaz Exit EndFor
EndFor
if &AutNiv > 1 and &PesRefDta.IsEmpty() &PesRefDta = serverdate() EndiF
if &PesRefClaTip.IsEmpty() &PesRefClaTip = ClassificacaoReferencia.INCOMPLETO EndIf
For &sdtObtidaInfitem in &sdtObtidaInf Do Case CAse &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtEml' &ObtEml = &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor
Case &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon1' &ObtFon1 = &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor
Case &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon2' &ObtFon2 = &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor
Case &sdtObtidaInfitem.Tipo = 'ObtFon3' &ObtFon3 = &sdtObtidaInfitem.valor EndCase EndFor
EndSub
